cover.kicker: BEFORE YOU BUY A DUTCH COURSE
cover.title: 5 questions that actually matter
cover.sub: If your goal is talking, not just passing.

phrases.en: Do I really have to speak?
phrases.when: If a course only tests recognition, you can finish it and still freeze. Look for one where speaking is required, not optional.
A native partner or a class of fifteen rarely matches your level. Look for practice that meets you where you are.
You need hundreds of low-stakes tries before the real conversation. Judgment-free practice beats a room watching you.

phrases.nl: Leer ik alle vijf de delen?
phrases.en: Do I learn all five parts?
phrases.when: Reading, listening, writing, speaking, and KNM. One course that covers all five beats stitching apps together.
If you can't show up at a fixed time every Tuesday, self-paced wins. Fifteen minutes still counts.

cta.title: Save this before you pay for a course.
cta.sub: Send it to whoever's about to start inburgering.
